allow:

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "ls /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/ && echo --- && ls /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/js/ 2>/dev/null && cat /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/manifest.json"

send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rusnas@10.10.10.72 "find /usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/ -type f"

expect eof
' 2>&1)

set timeout 30
spawn scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -r rusnas@10.10.10.72:/usr/share/cockpit/rusnas/* /Users/dvl92/projects/RusNAS/cockpit/rusnas/

send "kl4389qd\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)
